style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like fairy lights, dissolving into soft petal-shaped aura particles that pulse with a pastel pink and lavender glow. A delicate, translucent aura surrounds the body in a blooming floral pattern, refracting light into iridescent rainbows. The lighting mood is a warm, gentle radiance reminiscent of twilight blossoms, with faint musical note vibrations shimmering in the air. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
